V-M-080.scope: Visible logo integration verification for public, auth, user, admin, PWA/favicon, and email surfaces.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Prepared logo assets are selected at appropriate sizes for public/auth/user/admin/email contexts.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Logo placement strengthens brand presence without crowding mobile screens or admin tables.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Existing favicon/PWA/email-logo/BIMI boundaries remain documented and truthful.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Large logo files bloat first paint or visible logo overlaps form/navigation content.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Implementation claims control over mailbox sender avatars rather than body-logo/BIMI surfaces.
